trends.title: Solo operators replacing $10k/mo roles with agents
trends.summary: Indie hackers reporting 3-5x leverage from agent-driven workflows; replaces hires for content, prospecting, ops.

trends.title: Carousel feeds outperforming single images on LinkedIn 2x
trends.summary: LinkedIn algo update favors document/carousel posts; saves are the new like.
